text: Person Profiles have dedicated data mappings. First, ensure you are on the Map Phase.

onEnter: const hasPerson = SC.kernel.state.nodes.some(n => n.type === 'person-root'); if(!hasPerson) { const n = SC.kernel.addNode({ title: 'New Person', type: 'person-root' }); SC.kernel.selectNode(n.id); SC.kernel.bridge.fetchTemplateData('tpl_person_profile').then(data => { SC.kernel.applyTemplateToNode(n.id, data); SC.render(); }); } else { const p = SC.kernel.state.nodes.find(n => n.type === 'person-root'); SC.kernel.selectNode(p.id); SC.render(); }
text: Person Profiles are a specialized node type. I've imported a template and selected it for us. Let's inspect it.
The inspector panel dynamically adapts its layout depending on the node type. Person nodes display structured contact details.
Let's close the inspector to finish up.
